subject: Support deletion of archived services in SDC BE
commit_message:

Change-Id: I75201007c9cf6b71b035f14864e380d78aace12b
Signed-off-by: JvD_Ericsson <jeff.van.dam@est.tech>

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(24 comments)

Please use the ONAP coding style (with increased column limit of 150), I could see a couple of places where the code format is incorrect.

I would recommend to refactor the error handling part, by removing the either and adding specific errors for the various cases. I can help you with that.

Please, add test cases for the new methods and modifications.
